inputs.text: Ab main sookhi khaansi mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar thoda kam ho gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi vishisht lakshan nahi hain

inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, aur khaansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
